name: Test Fixing
description: Systematically identifies and fixes all failing tests using smart error grouping strategies. Runs tests, analyzes failure patterns, groups similar errors, and applies targeted fixes.

findings_summary.notes: Subdirectory confirmed to exist at engineering-workflow-plugin/skills/test-fixing with a SKILL.md. Parent repo mhattingpete/claude-skills-marketplace is active (406 stars, Apache-2.0, last pushed Jan 2026). SKILL.md has clear trigger conditions, systematic approach, and no external network calls or script execution required. Skill is purely declarative. No risk indicators found.
